title: vitex glabrata f. pallida
intro: Vitex glabrata f. pallida is a plant species that is a variant of the Vitex glabrata, a flowering plant in the Verbenaceae family, commonly known as the Vitex glabra or Chaste tree. The medicinal properties of Vitex glabrata f. pallida include its ability to act as a uterine stimulant and an emmenagogue, helping to regulate menstrual cycles and ease menstrual cramps. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS), such as mood swings, anxiety, and breast tenderness. Vitex glabrata f. pallida can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to promote hormonal balance and overall women's health.
